text.tspan: New FD in kernel FD table

div.p: htons() is mandatory sin_port = 8080 (no htons) → binds port 36895 (0x901F) x86 little-endian swaps 0x1F90 bind() succeeds; nothing connects
Two distinct FD types: server_fd = passive socket • Never recv/send from it • Lives entire server lifetime client_fd = connected socket • Created per accept() • Must close() after each use
Why recv() loops: TCP is a byte stream, not messages. One send(1400B) may arrive as: • recv()→700B + recv()→700B • OR recv()→1400B Loop until \r\n\r\n found. Single recv() = silent data loss.
